content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 5, 0), (2, 5, 1), (3, 9, 1), (0, 4, 4), (1, 3, 5), (3, 8, 6), (7, 9, 6), (2, 7, 7), (1, 6, 8), (0, 9, 11), (0, 6, 13), (3, 7, 17), (1, 7, 18), (0, 1, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 11.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (3, 5, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 5, 1) has node 2 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 9, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 4, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 3, 5) has node 1 and time 5. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (3, 8, 6) has node 3 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (7, 9, 6) has node 7 and time 6. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 7) has node 2 and time 7. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 6, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 9, 11) has node 0 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 6, 13) has node 0 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 7, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 7, 18) has node 1 and time 18. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 1, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 1.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 0 at time 11: 9, 6, 7, 8, 1, 3, 2, 4, 5, 18, 17, 19.

Answer: [9, 6, 7, 8, 1, 3, 2, 4, 5, 18, 17, 19]
